name: testing-bundle
description: Testing capability bundle v3.1.0: testing-bundle (router) + test-strategy-engineer (project-level strategy) + test-case-engineer (test case generation) + performance-test-engineer (performance testing) + bug-analyzer (bug root cause) + state-machine-test-engineer (state-machine-driven testing) + state-machine-testing MCP Server (optional enhancement). Use when user needs any testing capability.
